hero.subtitle: Artist and talent management for musicians building long careers. Releases, brand, touring, business.

list.title: Release Strategy
list.description: Release planning, timing and positioning. Every drop has a plan behind it.

list.title: Brand Development
list.description: Visual identity, story, audience growth. Building the artist's world without flattening the music.

list.title: Tour Management
list.description: Routing, logistics, contracts. From club circuits up to festival slots.

list.title: A&R
list.description: Artist discovery, creative direction, repertoire. Built around what the artist actually wants to make.

list.title: Global Distribution
list.description: DSPs, physical, sync-ready masters. All territories, all formats.

list.title: Sync & Licensing
list.description: Film, TV, games, ads. Placements that pay and travel.

story.copy: Seppe had been building rooms for Australian artists out of Perth for years. William Hobbs, working as Nitrose out of Miami, was making the parallel moves from the other side of the ocean. Servus is what happened when they joined forces. Established practice meeting young hunger, with a long view on what that means and the patience to write history on the way there.

roles.hint: Grab a row and pull it down

list.title: Artists
list.description: You make the music. We handle release strategy, distribution and brand, built around how you actually work.

list.title: Partners
list.description: Labels, venues, brands, festivals. We work on partnerships that come back the year after.

list.title: Investors
list.description: We're building infrastructure for artist careers that run on long timelines. Open to talking numbers.

list.title: Creatives
list.description: Photographers, directors, designers, producers. If you shape how music looks and feels, get in touch.

pathwaysDesc.artist: Submit your portfolio and music for A&R consideration.

footer.aboutText: Artist and talent management. Rooted in Perth and the US, working with artists worldwide.

showcase.desc: Build the team, the rollout and the business around the music you're already making.
